result.stdout:
Usage: kongverge [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information
  -v|--verbose                Optional. Verbose console output
  -H|--host <KongAdminHost>   Required. Kong Admin API host
  -P|--port <KongAdminPort>   Optional. Kong Admin API port (defaults to 8001)
  -u|--user <Username>        Optional. Basic Auth protected Kong Admin API Username
  -p|--password[:<Password>]  Optional. Basic Auth protected Kong Admin API Password (can be passed via redirected stdin)
  -i|--ignore <Tag>           Optional. A tag to be ignored when reading from Kong. Can be specified multiple times.

Commands:
  dry-run                     Perform a dry-run synchronize of configuration on the target host from the specified folder (doesn't make any changes to the target host)
  export                      Export existing configuration from the target host to the specified folder
  run                         Synchronize configuration on the target host from the specified folder

Run 'kongverge [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: kongverge [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information
  -v|--verbose                Optional. Verbose console output
  -H|--host <KongAdminHost>   Required. Kong Admin API host
  -P|--port <KongAdminPort>   Optional. Kong Admin API port (defaults to 8001)
  -u|--user <Username>        Optional. Basic Auth protected Kong Admin API Username
  -p|--password[:<Password>]  Optional. Basic Auth protected Kong Admin API Password (can be passed via redirected stdin)
  -i|--ignore <Tag>           Optional. A tag to be ignored when reading from Kong. Can be specified multiple times.

Commands:
  dry-run                     Perform a dry-run synchronize of configuration on the target host from the specified folder (doesn't make any changes to the target host)
  export                      Export existing configuration from the target host to the specified folder
  run                         Synchronize configuration on the target host from the specified folder

Run 'kongverge [command] --help' for more information about a command.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

result.stdout:
Export existing configuration from the target host to the specified folder

Usage: kongverge export [options] <OutputFolder>

Arguments:
  OutputFolder  Required. Folder to output data from host

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
